title: sida leprosa var. depauperata
intro: Sida leprosa var. depauperata, also known as a variant of the Sida leprosa plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sida leprosa var. depauperata include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
